title: Looking for a voice chat server/web client solution
snippet: Host a Mumble server. It's free and open source, and takes a few minutes to setup if you're used to hosting servers.

title: Building a Personal VoIP System
snippet: This guide will help you set up your own digital telephone system using open-source tools. This guide is written for those who are experienced with self- ...

title: Create a Personal Voice on iPhone, iPad, or Mac
snippet: In the Settings app, tap Accessibility, then tap Personal Voice. Tap Create a Personal Voice. Follow the onscreen instructions to record your voice.
